summary_en: ¥1,000M upper limit; 200,000 shares (2.7% of S/O); open-market purchase; May 22–Aug 31, 2026 execution window. Post-3:1 split (July 1, 2026), limit adjusts to 600,000 shares; yen ceiling unchanged. Acquired shares to be deployed for strategic M&A or restricted-stock grants to directors and employees.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Related to Treasury Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: On May 21, 2026, TENTIAL Inc. (TSE Growth, ticker 325A) announced a treasury share acquisition program authorized by the board under the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 200,000 shares of its own common stock within a ¥1,000M ceiling via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange between May 22 and August 31, 2026. This represents 2.7% of issued shares (excluding treasury stock). A 3:1 stock split scheduled for July 1, 2026 will adjust the share count limit to 600,000 shares; the yen ceiling remains ¥1,000M. The acquisition is justified on capital-efficiency grounds relative to the company's medium-term P&L targets and current EPS. Acquired shares will be reserved for strategic M&A deployment or issuance as restricted stock (RS) grants to directors and employees as performance incentives.
